title: rudbeckia serotina f. flavescens
intro: Rudbeckia serotina f. flavescens, also known as the Yellow Coneflower, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant and antiseptic. The health benefits of Rudbeckia serotina f. flavescens include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs and colds, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, from respiratory issues to skin conditions.
